title: Darwin
description: Development of the Unified Sales Funnel which serves as the system through which all sales for this client flow.

title: Sustainability Tracker
description: Web application for calculating the sustainability level of companies, including a dashboard where companies input parameters, and the system generates visualizations indicating their sustainability compared to others in the same country and industry.

title: Santander Open Academy
description: Online platform for the management and tracking of scholarships and courses within an organization.

title: Financial Fitness
description: Web application for calculating individuals' financial fitness. The application features a funnel where users, based on their input of expenses, debts, and savings, can gain detailed insights into their financial situation.

title: Portfolio
description: A creative showcase highlighting my expertise in web development. Featuring a modern design and intuitive interface, it showcases standout projects that reflect my passion for innovation and visually compelling aesthetics.
